steps.title: Use elimination to isolate x
steps.content:
The $y$ coefficients are $-24$ and $16$; their LCM is 48. Multiply equation 1 by 2 and equation 2 by 3 to make the $y$ coefficients opposites:
$$2(18x - 24y) = 2(37) \quad \Rightarrow \quad 36x - 48y = 74$$
$$3(7x + 16y) = 3(52) \quad \Rightarrow \quad 21x + 48y = 156$$
Add the equations to eliminate $y$:
$$57x = 230$$

steps.title: Solve for x and identify p
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 57:
$$x = \frac{230}{57}$$
Since the solution is $\left(\frac{p}{57}, \frac{w}{912}\right)$, we have $p = 230$.
